message.content:
### Detailed Description of the Mobile App Screenshot (Settings Page):  


#### **Overall Layout & Theme**  
The screenshot displays a **dark-themed mobile app settings page** with a clean, modern UI. The background is a deep navy/black, and the text/elements use high-contrast colors (white, pink, gray) for readability. The page is structured into sections with rounded containers, and a bottom navigation bar is visible.  


### **Top Status Bar**  
- **Time**: 10:38 am (left-aligned).  
- **Icons**: Moon (do not disturb), YouTube (app notification), and network status (9.80 k/s, Vo, R4G+, LTE, 62% battery) (right-aligned).  


### **Header Section**  
- **Title**: "Settings" (large, bold white text).  
- **Subtitle**: "Customize your experience" (smaller, gray text, centered below the title).  


### **Profile Section (Rounded Container)**  
A dark gray container with a pink user icon (👤) and the label "Profile" (white text) at the top.  

#### **1. Select Avatar**  
- Label: "Select Avatar" (gray text).  
- Avatar Grid: 2 rows of 5 circular avatar icons (dark gray background, yellow/colored avatars). The **first avatar (top-left)** is highlighted with a pink border (selected). Avatars include:  
  - Row 1: Male face, male in shirt, male with laptop, bearded male, male face.  
  - Row 2: Female face, female in shirt, female with laptop, female face, blonde female.  


#### **2. Name Field**  
- Label: "Name" (gray text).  
- Input Field: Dark gray rounded rectangle with white text: "Moniram Tamang".  


#### **3. Gender Selection**  
- Label: "Gender" (gray text).  
- Buttons: Three rounded buttons (dark gray background, white text):  
  - "Male" (pink text, selected/highlighted).  
  - "Female" (gray text).  
  - "Other" (gray text).  


#### **4. Date of Birth**  
- Label: "Date of Birth" (gray text).  
- Dropdown Field: Dark gray rounded rectangle with white text: "20/06/2000" (and a downward arrow icon on the right).  


#### **5. Save Profile Button**  
- Large, rounded pink button with white text: "Save Profile" (and a save icon 📁 to the left of the text).  


### **Bottom Navigation Bar**  
A dark gray bar with 5 icons (white/pink) and labels:  
- **Home**: House icon + "Home" (white text).  
- **Stats**: Bar chart icon + "Stats" (white text).  
- **+ (Floating Action Button)**: Large pink circle with a white plus sign (centered, prominent).  
- **Report**: Document icon + "Report" (white text).  
- **Setting**: Gear icon + "Setting" (pink text, indicating the current page).  


### **Additional Elements**  
- A partial "Appearance" section (cut off at the bottom) with font size options: "Small" (pink text), "Medium" (gray text), "Large" (gray text).  


### **Color Scheme**  
- Primary: Dark navy/black (background).  
- Accent: Pink (selected elements, buttons, FAB).  
- Text: White (main text), gray (labels, secondary text).  


This layout emphasizes customization (profile, appearance) with clear, interactive elements (buttons, dropdowns, avatar selection) and a consistent dark theme.
